title: [fixture] Logs page should show ingested ci_seed_stream entries
body:
## Reproduction steps

1. Log in to OpenObserve
2. Navigate to Logs
3. Select the `ci_seed_stream` stream from the stream picker
4. Run a query over the last 15 minutes

## Expected

The results table shows at least one log row from `ci_seed_stream`.

## Actual

(Synthetic — used to validate the test-assist CI plumbing. Expected verdict: FIXED.)
